articles.title: Hankin Group Breaks Ground on 72-Unit Multifamily Project in Exton, Pennsylvania
articles.summary: EXTON, PA. — Locally based developer Hankin Group has broken ground on a 72-unit multifamily project in Exton, about 35 miles west of Philadelphia. The project is an expansion of Keva Flats, a development that currently consists of 266 units on a 19-acre site. The new, five-story building will be the seventh within the development and will offer studio, one-, two- and three-bedroom units that will range in size from 795 to 1,570 square feet. Residents will have access to existing amenities at Ke

articles.title: JLL Arranges $70M in Bridge Financing for Delaware Industrial Building
articles.summary: CLAYMONT, DEL. — JLL has arranged $70 million in bridge financing for Tri-State Distribution Center, a 525,000-square-foot industrial building located about 25 miles outside of Philadelphia in Claymont, Delaware. The property features a clear height of 40-feet, an ESFR sprinkler system, 130-foot truck court depths, four drive-in ramps with overhead doors and “ample” trailer and car parking allotments. Construction began in August 2023. Michael Pagniucci, Chad Orcutt, Chris Drew, Ethan Rodgers an

articles.title: Urban Outfitters to Open New Distribution Facility in Metro Philadelphia, Add 1,050 Jobs
articles.summary: PHILADELPHIA AND FALLS TOWNSHIP, PA. — Urban Outfitters Inc. (NASDAQ: URBN), a global portfolio of apparel retail brands and physical shops that includes Urban Outfitters, Anthropologie and Free People, is making a major investment in its home market of metropolitan Philadelphia. The company has announced that it will open a new facility for its Nuuly brand in Falls Township, a city located 28 miles northeast of Philadelphia in Bucks County. articles.title: Keystone Mergers & Acquisitions Council celebrates anniversary with expansion
articles.summary: Keystone Mergers & Acquisitions Council expands from Lancaster to Philadelphia and Baltimore, adding new board members to grow its Mid-Atlantic network. The post Keystone Mergers & Acquisitions Council celebrates anniversary with expansion appeared first on Central Penn Business Journal .

articles.title: Bethlehem Colonial Industrial Quarter receives funds for restoration work
articles.summary: Historic Bethlehem Museums & Sites received $138,600 in grants to restore the 1761 tannery in the Colonial Industrial Quarter, enhancing local heritage tourism.

articles.title: PA Business Impact Group expands, opens advisory company in York
articles.summary: PA Business Impact Group expands with a new advisory office in York offering consulting, mergers & acquisitions, and bookkeeping for Central Pa. businesses. The post PA Business Impact Group expands, opens advisory company in York appeared first on Central Penn Business Journal .

articles.title: Coroner releases ID for tree-trimmer electrocuted in Pa.
articles.summary: The 31-year-old man was pronounced dead at the scene after an accident at a worksite in Berks County.
